name: Centrale del Latte d'Italia S.p.A.
summary: Centrale del Latte d'Italia S.p.A. produces and markets dairy products in Italy. The company offers fresh milk, high temperature pasteurized milk, long-life milk, cream, and yogurt. It also provides vegetable drinks, soy products, cheese, pasta, eggs, fresh salads, cured meat, kitchen-line products, desserts, and gluten-free products. The company was formerly known as Centrale del Latte di Torino & C. S.p.A. Centrale del Latte d'Italia S.p.A. was founded in 1950 and is based in Turin, Italy. As of July 30, 2020, Centrale del Latte d'Italia S.p.A. operates as subsidiary of Newlat Group S.A.
